title: JSON-stat 2.0 Curated Collection Schema
description: Curated de-duplicated collection schema. All shared definitions live in core.json and are inlined by tools/bundle-schemas.mjs at build time. Semantically equivalent to the vendored schemas/vendored/collection.json (enforced by the curated-equiv-vendored parity test). The vendored original re-inlines the full link-item property set; this one $refs core.json#/$defs/linkItemProperties.
